title: Hackerboard
feedClusterRequired: The live feed is only available when the game client is connected to the unified cluster binary (not the lightweight dev server).
signInFeed: Sign in to post and see the live feed.
reportPostIntro: Tell us what is wrong with this post. It will be hidden from your feed after you submit.
dmErrorPeerUnavailable: That hacker is not available in the current ranking list.
factionChatErrorNotInFaction: You are not in a faction.
rankingClusterRequired: Live rankings and server-backed social features need the unified cluster binary (not the lightweight dev server). Showing offline demo data.
rankingNetworkError: Could not load rankings. Check your connection and try again.
inviteErrorCreatorOnly: Only the faction creator can send invites.
inviteErrorTargetInFaction: That player is already in a faction.
inviteErrorAlreadyPending: An invite is already pending for that player.
inviteErrorBannedFromFaction: That player cannot be invited to this faction.
cancelInviteNotPending: This invite is no longer pending.
unblockErrorNotBlocked: That player is not on your block list.
profileInviteSentToast: Invite sent. {{username}} will see it in their inbox.
outgoingInvitesEmpty: No pending invites sent by your faction.
signInFaction: Sign in to open your faction.
noFactionYetBody: Create your own faction to chat with your team, or accept an invite sent to you in Messages.
noFactionHint: Invites from other hackers appear in Messages with Accept or Decline.
factionKickConfirm: Remove this member from the faction?
factionKickConfirmBan: Remove and block them from rejoining via invite?
kickFactionCreatorOnly: Only the faction creator can remove members.
kickFactionCannotKickLeader: The faction leader cannot be removed this way.
kickFactionTargetNotMember: That player is not in your faction.
unbanFactionCreatorOnly: Only the faction creator can allow invites again.
unbanFactionNotBanned: That player is not blocked from rejoining.
